title: Light Turkish Chickpeas Bowl
description: A fragrant, floral chickpea bowl inspired by Turkish flavors and quick Chinese fivespice tadka.

ingredients.name: tadka (mixed cumin & mustard seeds)
ingredients.amount: 1 teaspoon (½ tsp cumin seeds + ½ tsp mustard seeds)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3–4 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Pour in the vegetable broth, then add the chickpeas, Chinese five‑spice powder, and tadka. Bring to a gentle simmer.
Add the diced red bell pepper and let the mixture cook for 5–7 minutes, until the pepper is tender and the flavors meld.
Stir in the lemon juice and season with salt to taste.
Serve the chickpea mixture in bowls, topped with fresh diced cucumber.
Optional: Garnish with chopped parsley or a spoonful of plain yogurt for added creaminess.
